description: Pump P-101 reported excessive leakage at the mechanical seal during routine rounds. Technician Raj Patel isolated the pump per OSHA-105 lockout/tagout, removed the seal assembly, and found the seal faces scored and worn well before expected service life. Root cause suspected: misalignment inducing shaft runout. Seal replaced with OEM spec part; pump realigned and returned to service. See REG-022 for seal integrity reporting requirements.
